questions.question: Let f(x) = 2x - 1 and h(x) = f(x) + 3. What is h(5)?
If f(x) = x + 1 and g(x) = 2x, what is f(g(3))?
questions.explanation: Evaluate from the inside out: g(3) = 2(3) = 6. Then f(6) = 6 + 1 = 7.

questions.question: The function p(t) = 50 - 5t represents the temperature in degrees after t hours. What is p(2)?
If f(x) = 4x and g(x) = x - 3, what is g(f(2))?
questions.explanation: Evaluate from the inside out: f(2) = 4(2) = 8. Then g(8) = 8 - 3 = 5.
